full_text:
Xun Hong (Zhongmao)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Xun Hong, styledZhongmao, was born in Yingchuan. Cao Pi remarked on him as an amazing literary figure and a great man of debate. Xun Hong was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom.
